source: plan/bearings.md § Group-buy hero art — colorful SVGs
template: directive: simple line drawing + single splash of color illustrative of productKind board
subject: F12 TKL aluminum keyboard kit silhouette (CannonKeys Blaine V2: SE) in a warm terracotta colorway — full Esc+F1-F12 F-row, terracotta top bezel band and engraved-nameplate outline, right nav cluster (Ins/Home/PgUp, Del/End/PgDn) + arrow cluster identifying the TKL layout, and a neutral warm-grey basket-weave reveal band beneath the case suggesting the carbon-fiber bottom plate
prompt: CannonKeys Blaine V2: SE is an F12 TKL custom keyboard kit — aluminum case, carbon-fiber bottom plate, warm/classic mechanical-keyboard aesthetic. The composition centers a TKL case (1020×329px) on the 1200×750 canvas. This record's single splash is warm terracotta (oklch(0.62 0.13 35)), distinct from the fixed bronze family theme dot — used as: a low-alpha terracotta wash on the case body (the colorway), a wider terracotta top-bezel band (0.24 alpha, the classic machined top-bezel treatment), an engraved-nameplate outline (shape only, no text/logo baked in) centered on the bezel, four terracotta corner gasket/mount-point dots at the plate's interior corners, and a focal terracotta accent pip with halo at lower-right. The F12 TKL silhouette is unambiguous: a full F-row (Esc + F1-F12, 13 keys with two gaps at the natural F4/F8 breaks) sits above five alpha rows (number, QWERTY, home, bottom, mod/spacebar — 15-column dot grid, pitch 60px) with a wide spacebar rect; a 3x2 right nav cluster (Ins/Home/PgUp over Del/End/PgDn) and an inverted-T arrow cluster sit right of the alpha block; no numpad (the TKL tell). Beneath the case, a thin rounded band (980×22px) renders a tileable basket-weave pattern in neutral warm-grey (two crossing diagonal line sets at differing opacity, 0.28/0.16) to suggest the carbon-fiber bottom plate peeking out below the aluminum shell — material texture rendered in the family's neutral stroke color, not a second accent hue. Column guides at 0.10 opacity add depth without contesting the terracotta. Bronze theme dot (fixed, oklch(0.80 0.135 75)) sits at upper-right per family ornament convention, independent of this record's terracotta colorway. Single-splash discipline: terracotta is the only per-record accent hue; carbon-weave and stroke elements stay neutral warm-grey; bronze appears only at the fixed theme-dot position. Voice: knowledgeable peer — the F-row gap rhythm and nav/arrow clusters read the TKL layout directly into the silhouette; no text or logos baked into the art.
